mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review(rating, comment, order_id) VALUES(#{rating}, #{comment}, #{orderId})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, o.total_amount FROM review r JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY r.review_id DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username, o.total_amount FROM review r JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
